message.content: @startuml actor TeamMember as "Team Member" participant CreateUSTaskUI as ":CreateUSTaskUI" participant Controller as ":Controller\nTaskTypeStore : TaskTypeStore\ntaskTypesList : List\nprojectCode : String\nsprintId : int\nusid : long" component Company as ":Company" database taskTypeDB as "taskType" { class TaskType <> { +int id; -String name; getName() } } note over team member #lightgreen: 1 Ask to create a task of user story team member -> controller:getTaskTypes()\n2 controller->company:getProjectByCode(projectcode)\n3 activate company return project \n4 deactivate company loop for each known task type [5] activate controller note right of controller#yellow:green get all types from DB add them in list return this list end loop deactivate controler alt if there are some results[6] show resultset(teamember) else display error message("No data found") endif @enduml
